name: H.O.T. Human of TIRANA
overview: Dani, a young director full of dreams, finds himself drowning in mediocre commercials at the agency of Amanda's father, his fiancée. As Dani is sexually harassed by Jenny, advertising actress Amanda hires her friend in the agency to spy on Dan.

trailers.title: Seriali H.O.T. së shpejti në TVKlan.
